title: Avaritia x Create
description:
Avaritia and Create, two of the greatest combined.
(Currently in long queue of waiting for updates)
body:
![Titlecard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9acf781925977e1b828ed2699ec5b2903fa62ac.png) 
"Two of greatest combined"
Icon by MJ from our Discord server And FYI, the mod is in very early alpha versions, so expect very little. The mod is very underdeveloped and is in our queue to get worked on some time soon. # Description Avaritia X Create, as title suggests combines the well known and loved Create with Avaritia to just slightly speed up the process of getting from the start to the end of Avaritia. Since not everything lasts forever (or at least long enough to complete Avaritia), this mod was made, and since Create mod is what many people love, why not combine the two?
Updates Info This project will be updated after we update Under The Stars, which will take a while.. but hey! We'll get there eventually :) We'll make it for Fabric, Forge and NeoForge 1.20.1 and 1.21.1
Having issues, need to report a bug or just want to chat? Join our [official community Discord server](https://discord.gg/BcCDgnsCwQ)!
